query:
ALTER TABLE orders 
ADD COLUMN noteTags TEXT COMMENT '备注标签(JSON数组)',
ADD COLUMN discountInfo TEXT COMMENT '折扣信息(JSON对象)',
ADD COLUMN couponInfo TEXT COMMENT '优惠券信息(JSON对象)',
ADD COLUMN membershipInfo TEXT COMMENT '会员信息(JSON对象)',
ADD COLUMN paymentStatus VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '支付状态标签',
ADD COLUMN specialNotes TEXT COMMENT '特殊要求/备注';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute ALTER TABLE orders 
ADD COLUMN noteTags TEXT COMMENT '备注标签(JSON数组)',
ADD COLUMN discountInfo TEXT COMMENT '折扣信息(JSON对象)',
ADD COLUMN couponInfo TEXT COMMENT '优惠券信息(JSON对象)',
ADD COLUMN membershipInfo TEXT COMMENT '会员信息(JSON对象)',
ADD COLUMN paymentStatus VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '支付状态标签',
ADD COLUMN specialNotes TEXT COMMENT '特殊要求/备注';
